creator: johnson.peter@gmail.com
text:
Fix bugs that caused compiler errors and runtime crashes on recent
FreeBSD versions.  The compiler errors have the port currently marked
BROKEN.

Fix: See attached patch.  Two of the new patches fix runtime errors regarding
the use of closedir(3) (calling it with a NULL argument), the rest are
C++ build fixes.
How-To-Repeat: Port is marked BROKEN on 5.x.
